build.detail: TypeScript compilation passes. No type errors.

lint.detail: 80 prettier/prettier errors in LinkWithDetails.tsx (69) and index.tsx (11). All are CRLF line-ending violations (Delete \r). Auto-fixable with bun run lint:fix.

registration.detail: block.json valid. apiVersion:3, name:takt/link-with-details, all file references exist, attribute types valid.

tsxPhpSync.detail: All sync checks pass: no $attributes extraction anti-pattern, docblock present with @var annotations, HTML structure matches, attribute usage consistent, no providesContext/usesContext, className inside blockProps correct, no redundant null-coalescing, PHP function existence verified.

attributes.detail: All 4 attributes defined: anchor (string, no default — correct for anchor), headline (string, default ''), description (string, default ''), buttons (array, default with one tertiary button). Types and defaults match spec.

edgeCases.detail:
Empty description (Minimal Entry): no

element rendered — CUSTOM-006 passes. Long headline (110+ chars): wraps correctly, no overflow. Long description (500+ chars): renders without layout breakage. No horizontal overflow at any viewport (375, 768, 1024, 1440px).

interactiveBehavior.reason: No interactive elements. Block contains only static content and a native <a> link.

accessibility.detail: Link pattern rule file not found (no link.json in accessibility-rules/); manual verification performed instead. Native <a> element provides implicit link role. Global *:focus-visible rule (body.css:35) applies outline-2 outline-black outline-dotted outline-offset-1 to all focusable elements including btn-tertiary. btn-tertiary:focus-visible also applies text color change. Heading hierarchy: h3 inside demo-container (h2 context) — correct. No ARIA attributes needed; native elements used throughout. Images: none present.

patternCompliance.summary: Native <a> element with href. Focus visible via global *:focus-visible rule. cursor:pointer inherited from btn-tertiary utility. No aria-label needed — button text is descriptive.

markupDuplication.detail: No duplicate markup found. Single DOM tree renders identically at all breakpoints via CSS. No cloneNode() or hidden-md/show-md patterns.

specCompliance.detail: All spec requirements verified: h3 with text-header-5, description with text-body font-medium, div wrapper with flex flex-col gap-6, btn-tertiary button with arrow icon, allowVariationChange:false in editor, only button is clickable. CSS adjacent sibling selector (.wp-block-takt-link-with-details + .wp-block-takt-link-with-details) applies border-top:1px solid var(--color-charcoal), margin-top:2rem (32px), padding-top:2rem (32px) for consecutive blocks. Empty description hidden on frontend. renameBlock() and shouldDisplay() patterns correctly implemented.

automated.LINKS_HREF: note — 11 links with href='#', expected on test page
automated.REDUCED_MOTION: pass — no animations in block CSS; global prefers-reduced-motion handler in body.css covers btn-tertiary-arrow transition

manual.RESPONSIVE_RENDER: pass — verified via screenshots at all 4 widths across 3 browsers
manual.static.CTA_BUTTONS: pass — btn-tertiary with arrow renders and links correctly
manual.interactive.POINTER_CURSOR: pass — btn-tertiary has cursor-pointer via utility
manual.interactive.TOUCH_TARGET: pass — btn-tertiary is inline-flex with adequate touch area
manual.interactive.NO_FOCUS_TRAP: pass — no interactive containers, single link passes through
manual.CUSTOM-001: pass — CSS sibling selector confirmed in LinkWithDetails.css; consecutive blocks verified as direct DOM siblings in rendered HTML; Second and Third Program blocks receive border-top, margin-top, padding-top
manual.CUSTOM-002: pass — variation='tertiary' hardcoded in both TSX and PHP; allowVariationChange:false in editor; arrow icon rendered via btn-tertiary-arrow span
manual.CUSTOM-003: pass — only <a> inside <div> is interactive; block wrapper is a plain div with no click handler or pointer cursor
manual.CUSTOM-004: pass — h3.text-header-5 confirmed in page audit (all 11 instances)
manual.CUSTOM-005: pass — flex flex-col gap-6 on wrapper; gap-6=24px in Tailwind
manual.CUSTOM-006: pass — Minimal Entry (index 6): description selector returns count=0 in page audit

issues.description: CRLF line endings in LinkWithDetails.tsx and index.tsx — Prettier reports 80 Delete \r violations
issues.fix: Run: bun run lint:fix — this auto-removes CRLF endings from both files

issues.description: btn-tertiary anchor class attribute contains leading newline and trailing tab whitespace in rendered HTML: class="\n\tbtn-tertiary \t". This comes from the ThemeButton PHP template and is cosmetically harmless but untidy.
issues.fix: Trim whitespace around the class value in the ThemeButton PHP output. This is a ThemeButton issue, not specific to LinkWithDetails.

passedChecks: Block.json registration valid (apiVersion:3, all file refs exist, types correct)
TSX/PHP sync passes all 8 automated sub-checks
All 4 attributes defined correctly with matching defaults
h3.text-header-5 renders on all 11 block instances
btn-tertiary button with arrow icon renders on all 11 instances
Empty description correctly omitted from rendered HTML (Minimal Entry)
Adjacent sibling CSS selector applies border-top/margin-top/padding-top to consecutive blocks
Global focus-visible outline applies to btn-tertiary link
Test page: 11 instances in 6 demo-containers, all variations present, no stale markup, no placeholders
Long content edge case renders without breakage

visualObservations.375px: Single-column layout. All blocks stack vertically. h3 headlines render in Anton font at header-5 size. Descriptions in General Sans. btn-tertiary with arrow aligned left. Consecutive blocks (Second/Third Program) show visible top border + spacing. Minimal Entry correctly shows no description paragraph. Consistent across chromium/firefox/webkit.
visualObservations.768px: Layout identical to mobile — block is an inner block with no breakpoint-specific layout changes. Content fills width of demo-container. Long headline wraps cleanly. Consistent across browsers.
visualObservations.1024px: Same single-column behavior. Demo-container provides the containing width. All variations visible and well-spaced. Consecutive border separator clearly visible between First/Second/Third Program blocks.
visualObservations.1440px: Full desktop rendering. All 6 demo-container variations visible. Blocks render within their demo-container panels at appropriate widths. Long Content edge case wraps correctly with no overflow. Adjacent sibling borders clearly visible in Consecutive Blocks demo. No visual issues detected across all 3 browsers.
